name: Mornington Dumpling House
signature: Hand-folded dumplings, steamed and pan-fried, plus a short list of Sichuan-leaning classics  -  Mornington's essential Chinese address
editorNote:
Mornington Dumpling House is the Peninsula's essential Chinese room and quietly one of the most reliable dinner stops in town. The dumplings are hand-folded in the kitchen  -  pork-and-chive, prawn, vegetable  -  served steamed or pan-fried, and the Sichuan-leaning mains rotate through the usual suspects done with enough competence to make an honest meal out of them. Mapo tofu, twice-cooked pork, dry-fried green beans, a dan dan noodle when the kitchen is running it.

This is the weeknight meal you default to when you want something uncomplicated that the kids will also eat. Walk in on most nights. Book on weekends.

Order the pork-and-chive. Order the mapo. Share everything.
